meaning: n.(一种压成饼状的)板烟,烟草饼
examples: Mrs. Cavendish is a dear friend of mine.
A century earlier, Henry Cavendish had noted the existence of a residual gas when oxygen and nitrogen are removed from air, but its importance had not been realized.
Cavendish took the green jersey in style, winning the final stage in Paris.
After the race, Cavendish praised the remarkable work put in by his Columbia team-mates.
All bananas you find in U.S. grocery stores are of the same variety, the Cavendish.
